category_sources: Official GitLab project is under sequoia-pgp and describes the Chameleon GnuPG interface.
source_facts.description says it reimplements gpg and gpgv using Sequoia.
display_name_sources: Official GitLab project name is sequoia-chameleon-gnupg.
docs_sources: Official GitLab README is the best official documentation surface found for the package.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://gitlab.com/sequoia-pgp/sequoia-chameleon-gnupg; per instruction, repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions gpg and gpgv reimplementation using Sequoia.
